welcome.title:
Welcome,
this is PawTaker
welcome.subtitle: The community pet-sitting app
welcome.languageHint: Opens a menu to choose English or French

onboarding.slide1Body: Connect with verified, local caretakers who treat your pet like family. The right care is just a search and a tap away.
onboarding.slide2Body: From quick midday walks to long-time, find the perfect match for your routine. Manage every detail in one clean space.
onboarding.slide3Body: Every walk, stay, and playdate earns you points. No payments, no fees—just pet lovers helping pet lovers keep tails wagging.

kycModal.title: Let's get you verified
kycModal.description: To keep our pet community safe — and so you can post requests, apply to pet-sitting jobs, and message other members — we need to quickly confirm your identity. It only takes a couple of minutes.
kycModal.pendingDescription: We're reviewing your documents. This usually takes 24–48 hours. Once approved, you can post requests, add pets, apply to pet-sitting jobs, and offer availability.
kycModal.rejectedDescription: We couldn’t approve your last submission. Please review the requirements and resubmit so you can apply for sits, message owners, and use the rest of the app.

myCare.title: My Care
myCare.applyingDescription: A message with your availability details will be sent to this pet's owner.
myCare.receivedFooterLine1: Give more care to earn more points.
myCare.receivedFooterLine2Prefix: Points may be convertible to cash.

contract.title: Contract
contract.acceptHint: Accept the offer to unlock the agreement actions.
contract.acceptConfirmDescription:
You will match with this caregiver for this request and start the agreement flow. You can review the contract next.

Ending rules (simple):
- Before the start date: if the owner ends the contract, the caregiver gets 0 points.
- After the start date:
  - If the owner ends the contract: the caregiver gets full points immediately.
  - If the caregiver ends the contract: the caregiver gets 0 points.
- Receiving care does not reduce the owner's points.
contract.acceptDisclaimer: By tapping Accept Offer, you approve that anyone in the community can contact you in our chat system.
contract.terminateRuleBeforeStart: Before start date: if the owner ends the contract, the caregiver gets 0 points.
contract.terminateRuleAfterStartOwner: Owner ends contract: caregiver gets full points immediately.
contract.terminateRuleAfterStartTaker: Caregiver ends contract: caregiver gets 0 points.
contract.terminateConfirmDescription:
This ends the contract immediately.

Ending rules (simple):
- Before the start date: if the owner ends the contract, the caregiver gets 0 points.
- After the start date:
  - If the owner ends the contract: the caregiver gets full points immediately.
  - If the caregiver ends the contract: the caregiver gets 0 points.
- Receiving care does not reduce the owner's points.
contract.terminationPendingHint: Waiting for the other party to confirm.
contract.terminationPendingRequesterBody: The other party must also confirm before this agreement is fully terminated.
contract.terminationPendingRecipientBody: Confirm termination to fully end this agreement.
contract.reactivateConfirmDescription: This will cancel your termination request and keep the agreement active.
contract.acceptTerminationConfirmDescription: This will end the agreement and release points. This cannot be undone.
contract.terminationRequestedNotificationBody: {{name}} has requested to end the care agreement.
contract.terminationAcceptedNotificationBody: The other party confirmed the termination.
